display.purpose: Hero headline only. One per page. The <h1> on HeroSection. Never use for section headings.

headline.purpose: Section headings via SectionHeading component. One gold accent word allowed per heading.

title.purpose: Card titles, category names, nav items, modal headings.

body.purpose: All prose. Max 65–75ch. Use text-white/60 or text-white/70 on dark backgrounds.

label.purpose: Short structural labels only (≤5 words), 0.75rem, uppercase, tracked. Not a default kicker.

shadows.name: trophy-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA buttons and gold-fill elements. The action signal.

shadows.name: trophy-glow-subtle
shadows.purpose: Smaller gold elements — navbar CTA, gold icon containers.

shadows.name: ink-ambient
shadows.purpose: Light-surface cards on hover lift. Not at rest.

shadows.name: nav-scroll
shadows.purpose: Navbar scroll state. Paired with border-bottom: 1px solid #F3F4F6 (border-subtle).

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Default entrance animation — 0.6s ease-out, translateY(20px) → 0. Disable under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default transition for interactive state changes (button hover, nav link, color). Applied via Tailwind transition-all duration-200.

motion.name: countdown-tick
motion.purpose: The useCountdown hook updates state every 1s. No CSS animation needed; React re-renders the tabular-nums span.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA — apply, explore, submit. Gold fill, ink text, pill shape.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #F7B413; color: #1B1233; font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(247,179,19,0.15); transition: all 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #FDCE62; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(247,179,19,0.25); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #CF7B0E; transform: scale(0.99); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(247,179,19,0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA — explore categories, learn more. Gold border, transparent fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #F7B413; font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 2px solid #F7B413; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #F7B413; color: #1B1233; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(247,179,19,0.5); }

components.name: Section Heading
components.description: Section entrance heading with spectrum gradient underline rule and optional gold accent word.
components.html:
Award Categories

Five tracks spanning the breadth of Nepal's ICT ecosystem.
components.css: .ds-section-heading { } .ds-section-heading__rule { width: 48px; height: 4px; border-radius: 9999px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4C2D75 0%, #6E2C68 25%, #9B2850 50%, #BD203A 75%, #C20F1A 100%); margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-section-heading__title { font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: clamp(1.875rem, 4vw, 2.25rem); line-height: 1.2; color: #1B1233; margin: 0 0 1rem 0; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-section-heading__accent { color: #F7B413; } .ds-section-heading__subtitle { font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(27,18,51,0.70); margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Fixed top navigation — light surface, gold active state, blur backdrop.
components.html:
ICT AWARD
HomeCategoriesWinners
Apply Now
components.css: .ds-navbar { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 50; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border-bottom: 1px solid #F3F4F6; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-navbar__inner { max-width: 80rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 1.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 4rem; } .ds-navbar__logo { font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #1B1233; } .ds-navbar__links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(27,18,51,0.70); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #F7B413; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #F7B413; } .ds-navbar__cta { background: #F7B413; color: #1B1233; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(247,179,19,0.15); transition: all 200ms; } .ds-navbar__cta:hover { background: #FDCE62; }

components.name: Category Group Badge
components.description: Group identifier chip with spectrum color. Applied via inline style — not dynamic Tailwind classes.
components.html: AStartup & Innovation
components.css: .ds-group-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-group-badge__letter { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-group-badge__label { font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Standard light-surface card. Flat at rest, ink-ambient shadow on hover.
components.html:
Startup ICT Award 2026

Recognizes a Nepali tech startup that has effectively leveraged ICT to drive innovation, growth, and impact.

View eligibility
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #F3F4F6; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 1.5rem; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out, transform 200ms ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(27,18,51,0.12); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card__title { font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #1B1233; margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card__body { font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(27,18,51,0.70); margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0; } .ds-card__link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #F7B413; text-decoration: none; transition: gap 150ms; } .ds-card__link:hover { gap: 0.625rem; }

components.name: Footer
components.description: Dark ink footer with spectrum top rule, logo, link columns, and date strip.
components.html:
ICT AWARD

Honoring Excellence in the Technology Sector of Nepal and Beyond.

Navigation

  • Home
  • About
  • Categories

© 2026 ICT Award Nepal

Grand Finale: December 18, 2026
components.css: .ds-footer { background: #1B1233; font-family: 'Nunito Sans', Calibri, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-footer__spectrum-rule { height: 4px; width: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4C2D75 0%, #6E2C68 25%, #9B2850 50%, #BD203A 75%, #C20F1A 100%); } .ds-footer__inner { max-width: 80rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 4rem 1.5rem 2rem; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; } .ds-footer__logo-placeholder { font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #F7B413; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-footer__tagline { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.60); max-width: 24rem; margin: 0; } .ds-footer__group-title { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #F7B413; margin: 0 0 1rem 0; } .ds-footer__links { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-footer__link { font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.60); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-footer__link:hover { color: #F7B413; } .ds-footer__bottom { max-width: 80rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; } .ds-footer__copy { font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.60); margin: 0; } .ds-footer__dates { font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.60); margin: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-footer__dates strong { color: #F7B413; font-weight: 700; } .ds-footer__live-dot { display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #C20F1A; }

narrative.overview:
The ICT Awards Nepal design system exists to stage excellence — not as a distant spectacle, but as an open invitation. The site IS the stage; applicants are the protagonists. A 21-year-old student reading the Rising Star category description should feel 'I could be up there,' not 'those people are impressive.' Every surface tips toward aspiration over ceremony, inclusion over prestige.

The palette — Trophy Gold on Deep Indigo Night, with a Signature Spectrum of indigo-to-red — is extracted directly from the ICT-AWARD-Logo.png. This is not a 'dark/gold awards site' cliché; every color has a logo source. The Signature Spectrum (Groups A through E) turns a navigation problem into a brand system: each group has its own voice within the same arc.

The typography is single-family Nunito Sans, pushed hard through weight contrast. At font-weight 900, headings read as muscular and proud; at 400, body text is warm and legible. No second family is introduced — weight does the work that most systems use a pairing to achieve.
keyCharacteristics: Deep Indigo Night anchors hero and footer; cream and white breathe between sections
Trophy Gold marks achievement — CTAs, active states, accent words. Its scarcity makes it feel earned.
The Signature Spectrum orients group navigation via GROUP_COLOR map, not as ambient decoration
Pill-shaped buttons signal openness — confident and decisive
A spectrum gradient rule (48px × 4px) precedes every section heading — the system's consistent punctuation

rules.name: The Logo Source Rule
rules.body: Every brand color traces back to ICT-AWARD-Logo.png. If a proposed color doesn't appear in the trophy gold, the AWARD wordmark spectrum, or the logo ink, it doesn't belong.

rules.name: The Earned Gold Rule
rules.body: Trophy Gold marks achievement. It is not a section background, a card fill, or an ambient tint. Its rarity on any given screen is what makes a CTA feel like the next step forward.

rules.name: The Group Color Rule
rules.body: Award group colors (A–E via GROUP_COLOR) are applied exclusively via inline style props. Dynamic Tailwind class construction is purged at build time and will silently break. Group E uses #C20F1A — the unified AA-safe red (== spectrum.e, live, gradient endpoint). All five groups pass WCAG AA ≥4.5:1 as normal text on white/cream/surface-alt (verified 2026-06-19).

rules.name: The Weight-Is-Voice Rule
rules.body: All typographic hierarchy is achieved through font-weight contrast (900 vs 700 vs 400), not through a second font family or size alone. Introducing a second family requires explicit justification.

rules.name: The Uppercase Cap Rule
rules.body: All-caps is reserved for label scale copy only — short labels at 0.75rem with letter-spacing. Never apply uppercase to body copy, card descriptions, or headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are unshadowed at rest. Shadow appears only as a response to state (hover, CTA significance, scroll). If everything carries a shadow, nothing is emphasized.

dos: Do use Trophy Gold (#F7B413) exclusively as an action and highlight color. Its scarcity is what makes it feel earned.
Do apply award group colors via inline style props using GROUP_COLOR from src/data/categories.ts.
Do use #C20F1A for Group E — the unified value for spectrum.e, live, gradient endpoint, and GROUP_COLOR.E. It passes WCAG AA on all light surfaces.
Do use ICT-AWARD-Logo-Dark-Bg.png on dark surfaces and ICT-AWARD-Logo.png on light surfaces. Always include onError fallback.
Do use the spectrum gradient for decorative rules and dividers only — not as text fill.
Do give every countdown/scroll animation a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
Do cap body copy at 65–75ch. Use text-white/60 on dark backgrounds for body paragraphs.
Do use text-wrap: balance on all h1–h3 elements.
donts: Don't use trophies, handshakes, or certificate imagery as hero visuals. Generic award-site templates misrepresent Nepal's forward-looking tech sector.
Don't introduce the blue-gradient dev-conference palette. This is a celebration, not a summit.
Don't mimic Fortune 500 award program grey palettes or formal corporate register.
Don't apply the Signature Spectrum gradient to text via background-clip: text.
Don't use border-left thicker than 1px as a colored accent on cards or list items.
Don't add a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section heading.
Don't render Trophy Gold as small text on light backgrounds — it fails WCAG AA.
Don't add a dark-mode toggle. The light/dark surface rhythm is intentional.
Don't use overflow: hidden on any container that parents a dropdown — the navbar dropdown will clip.
